A [[Gender|male]] '''Kajain'sa'Nikto''' [[bounty hunter]] fought against [[Din Djarin]] in an attempt to [[Hunt for Grogu|capture]] [[Din Grogu|Grogu]], on the [[desert]] [[planet]] of [[Tatooine]]. He was accompanied by three other hunters; [[Biran Redben]], a [[helmet]]ed [[Unidentified Kajain'sa'Nikto's ally 2|humanoid male]] and a small [[Unidentified Kajain'sa'Nikto's ally 1|alien]] of the same [[species]] as [[Scrapjaw Motito]]. They were unsuccessful in their attempt, and the male [[Nikto]] was knocked out by the [[Mandalorian]].

==Biography==
[[File:GrapplingWithMando-TMCh10.png|thumb|left|250px|The bounty hunter and his helmeted accomplice grapple with Djarin.]]
In [[9 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{MandoDate|10}}</ref> this Nikto [[bounty]] [[hunter]],<ref name="audio description" /> alongside another helmeted hunter, placed a spring-loaded trap in a valley on Tatooine, in an attempt to capture Grogu from Din Djarin. As the Mandalorian approached the trap, both hunters pulled on the concealed rope, close-lining Din and Grogu off of their [[Zephyr-J speeder bike|Zephyr-J]] [[speeder bike]]. The Mandalorian managed to survive the crash, using his [[jetpack]] to stabilize himself. Failing to incapacitate their target, the Nikto bounty hunter followed his helmeted accomplice, and opened fire on Din Djarin. Soon after, Biran Redben<ref name="Chapter 14">{{TheMandalorian|Chapter 14: The Tragedy}} identifies the moustached individual as "Biran Redben".</ref> came running out from the back of a nearby boulder; engaging Din Djarin in melee combat, and disarming him of his [[The Mandalorian's IB-94 blaster pistol|blaster pistol]]. Attempting to aid their moustached comrade, who had just been sliced in the neck with a [[Vibroknife|vibro-knife]], the Nikto and his helmeted associate engaged the Mandalorian in hand-to-hand combat. This fight wouldn't last long; however, as Din Djarin used his [[whipcord launcher]] to grab the [[blaster rifle]] off of the Nikto's short [[alien]] accomplice, who was trying to blast the Mandalorian, and used it to knock him unconscious.<ref name="Chapter 10" />

==Personality and traits==
The male bounty hunter<ref name="audio description" /> was a member of the [[Kajain'sa'Nikto]], a [[subspecies]] of the [[Sentience|sentient]] [[humanoid]] [[Nikto]] [[species]].<ref name="DB" /> He had [[Color|beige]], [[leather]]y skin and brown [[eye]]s. The bounty hunter also had stubby, [[bone]]-like horns around his head and chin. Shortly before his skirmish with the Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin, the Nikto showed some craftsmanship, as he was able to set up a make-shift trap by hand. He was also competent with a blaster rifle, as he didn't miss a single shot during his fight with the Mandalorian.<ref name="Chapter 10" />

==Equipment==
[[File:C10Skirmish.png|thumb|right|230px|The Nikto bounty hunter utilized a blaster rifle against Din Djarin.]]
During his skirmish with the Mandalorian bounty hunter Din Djarin, the Kajain'sa'Nikto wore a maroon jumpsuit; similar in appearance to a [[flight suit]], with netting around his neck. He was also equipped with a white utility-belt, and utilized a [[scope]]d [[blaster]] [[rifle]] which fired red blaster bolts.<ref name="Chapter 10" />

==Behind the scenes==
The male Kajain'sa'Nikto bounty hunter was created for, and first appeared in, "[[Chapter 10: The Passenger]]," the second episode of the [[The Mandalorian Season Two|second season]] of ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian]]'',<ref name="Chapter 10" /> which was released on [[November 6]], [[2020]].<ref name="D23 November">{{D23|url=everything-new-you-can-stream-on-disney-in-november-2020|text=Everything New You Can Stream on Disney+ in November 2020}}</ref> While it is not directly stated in the episode that the Nikto is a bounty hunter, the audio description identifies him, and his friends, as hunters.<ref name="audio description" />
